info.name: Currency Peso Mexicano
info.description: Mexican Peso (MXN) exchange rates relative to USD (base currency)

buyRate.description: Exchange rate to buy MXN with USD. Example: 17.72 means 1 USD = 17.72 MXN

sellRate.description: Exchange rate to sell MXN for USD. Example: 17.70 means 1 USD = 17.70 MXN
